metadata._comment: Alabama county property tax data. Assessment ratio is 10% of market value for Class III (owner-occupied residential). Rates shown per $100 of ASSESSED value. Effective rate on market value is ~1/10th of stated rate.
metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — AL
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties. Alabama uses 10% assessment ratio for residential homesteads.
sources: Alabama Department of Revenue — Property Tax Division

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of ASSESSED value (10% of market value for Class III residential homestead).
notes.scope: Covers counties with major military installations — Redstone Arsenal (Madison), Coast Guard/Austal (Mobile).
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county commissions. Alabama reappraises on 4-year cycle.
notes.assessment_ratio: Alabama assessed value = 10% of market value. Effective rate on market value is approximately 1/10th of the stated per-$100-assessed rate.

military_installations: Redstone Arsenal (US Army / NASA Marshall Space Flight Center / MDA)

property_tax.homestead_exemption: State portion (6.5 mills) exempted for all homestead owners. Full exemption from ALL ad valorem taxes for P&T disabled or age 65+.
property_tax._note: Rate shown is for City of Huntsville. Madison City rate is $6.95/100 assessed. Unincorporated county is $3.35-$3.65/100. AL assessed value = 10% of market value.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: Permanently and totally disabled (100% P&T). No income limit.
disabled_veteran_100_pct.applies_to: Homestead and up to 160 adjacent acres — ALL state, county, city, and school ad valorem taxes

va_adapted_housing.eligibility: Home acquired through VA Specially Adapted Housing Grant
va_adapted_housing.applies_to: Full value of home — ALL ad valorem taxes regardless of value

disabled_veteran_partial.note: Alabama does not have a partial disabled veteran property tax exemption based on rating percentage. The exemption is all-or-nothing: P&T disabled = full exemption.

payment_plans._note: Alabama does not offer quarterly payment plans. Taxes due in full by Dec 31.

application.deadline: Apply through county Tax Assessor. No specific deadline.

military_installations: Coast Guard Aviation Training Center Mobile

property_tax.homestead_exemption: State portion (6.5 mills) exempted for all homestead owners. Full exemption from ALL ad valorem taxes for P&T disabled or age 65+.
property_tax._note: Rate shown is for City of Mobile. Unincorporated areas have lower rates. AL assessed value = 10% of market value.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: Permanently and totally disabled (100% P&T). No income limit.
disabled_veteran_100_pct.applies_to: Homestead and up to 160 adjacent acres — ALL state, county, city, and school ad valorem taxes

va_adapted_housing.eligibility: Home acquired through VA Specially Adapted Housing Grant
va_adapted_housing.applies_to: Full value of home — ALL ad valorem taxes regardless of value

disabled_veteran_partial.note: Alabama does not have a partial disabled veteran property tax exemption based on rating percentage. The exemption is all-or-nothing: P&T disabled = full exemption.

payment_plans._note: Alabama does not offer quarterly payment plans. Taxes due in full by Dec 31.

application.address: 3925 Michael Blvd, Suite G, Mobile, AL 36609
application.deadline: Apply through county Revenue Commission. No specific deadline.
